name: PipelineTerraformDriftReport
description: Parse a Terraform/OpenTofu plan JSON into drift counts + a changed-resource summary and optionally POST it to a Terraform State Manager (TSM) drift callback
author: sethbacon

inputs.name: planJsonFile
inputs.label: Plan JSON file
inputs.helpMarkDown: Path to the JSON output of `terraform show -json <plan>` (or `tofu show -json <plan>`).

inputs.name: includeModuleProvenance
inputs.label: Include module provenance
inputs.helpMarkDown: Include the configuration's module_calls (+ module lockfile) in the report/callback.

inputs.name: moduleManifest
inputs.label: Module manifest
inputs.helpMarkDown: Resolved module lockfile used to report locked module versions.

inputs.name: failOnDrift
inputs.label: Fail on drift
inputs.helpMarkDown: Fail the task when drift is detected.

inputs.name: detail
inputs.label: Detail
inputs.helpMarkDown: Free-text run label forwarded as the callback `detail` field (e.g. `$(Build.BuildId)`).

inputs.name: callbackUrl
inputs.label: TSM callback URL
inputs.helpMarkDown: TSM drift callback URL. The result is POSTed only when both callbackUrl and callbackToken are set.

inputs.name: callbackToken
inputs.label: TSM callback token
inputs.helpMarkDown: Per-run one-shot TSM callback token, sent as the X-TSM-Callback-Token header.

inputs.name: rejectUnauthorized
inputs.label: Verify callback TLS
inputs.helpMarkDown: Verify the callback's TLS certificate. Set false only for a private-CA endpoint the agent does not trust.

inputs.name: failOnCallbackError
inputs.label: Fail on callback error
inputs.helpMarkDown: Fail the task when the TSM callback returns a non-2xx response. Disable to log a warning and continue instead -- e.g. so a flaky/overloaded TSM backend doesn't fail the pipeline when the local drift analysis (already written to the summary file) succeeded.

inputs.name: sarifOutput
inputs.label: Write a SARIF report
inputs.helpMarkDown: Write a SARIF 2.1.0 report of drifted resources and expose its path via the `sarifFilePath` output variable. Publish it as a build artifact to surface drift in SARIF-aware tooling.

inputs.name: sarifPath
inputs.label: SARIF output path
inputs.helpMarkDown: Optional explicit path for the SARIF report. When empty, a file is written to the agent temp directory; either way its path is exposed via the `sarifFilePath` output variable.

inputs.name: cleanupSummaryFile
inputs.label: Delete the summary file at task end
inputs.helpMarkDown: Delete the JSON summary file (written to the agent temp directory) when the task finishes. It is retained by default so downstream steps can read it via the `summaryFilePath` output variable. Enable to remove it immediately after the callback -- e.g. on a self-hosted agent whose temp directory is not wiped between jobs and where the summary may contain sensitive plan values.

OutputVariables.name: driftDetected
OutputVariables.description: 'true' when any non-no-op, non-read change was planned.

OutputVariables.name: addedCount
OutputVariables.description: Count of resources whose plan contains a create.

OutputVariables.name: changedCount
OutputVariables.description: Count of resources whose plan contains an update.

OutputVariables.name: destroyedCount
OutputVariables.description: Count of resources whose plan contains a delete.

OutputVariables.name: summaryFilePath
OutputVariables.description: Path to the JSON report written to the agent temp directory (the exact callback body).

OutputVariables.name: sarifFilePath
OutputVariables.description: Path to the SARIF 2.1.0 report (set only when 'Write a SARIF report' is enabled).

messages.PlanFileNotFound: planJsonFile does not exist: %s. Provide the JSON output of 'terraform show -json <plan>' (or 'tofu show -json <plan>').
messages.PlanFileInvalidJson: Failed to parse planJsonFile '%s' as JSON: %s. Provide the JSON output of 'terraform show -json <plan>' (or 'tofu show -json <plan>').
messages.DriftSummary: Drift: drifted=%s added=%s changed=%s destroyed=%s (%s changed resources)
messages.RejectUnauthorizedDisabled: rejectUnauthorized is disabled: TLS certificate validation is OFF for the drift callback, so the callback token is sent over an unverified TLS channel. Use only for an internal TSM endpoint fronted by a private CA the agent does not trust.
messages.DriftCallbackNonFatal: Drift callback failed (HTTP %s): %s. Continuing because failOnCallbackError is disabled.
messages.CallbackUrlAndTokenRequired: Both callbackUrl and callbackToken are required to POST results; skipping callback.
